---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the user pain or workflow gap. Concrete examples help.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like sdlab to do. Include CLI surface sketches if relevant.

```bash
# Example usage
sdlab <command> <args>
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposal.

## Does this fit the canon-first design

sdlab treats canon as truth and artifacts as derivable. Does the feature respect that? If it would introduce parallel truth or mutable generated state, flag it explicitly.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, prior art in other tools.
